data.title: David Beckham-Backed Healthcare Org, Prenetics, Bets $20M on Bitcoin
data.description:
Prenetics, a Nasdaq-listed healthcare firm backed by David Beckham, has become the first in its sector to buy Bitcoin, investing $20M in the asset.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/david-beckham-backed-prenetics-bets-20m-bitcoin/

data.title: Arizona Senate Passes Bitcoin Reserve Bill for Seized Crypto, Heads to House for Debate
data.description:
The bill seeks to establish a state-managed digital asset fund using crypto seized through criminal forfeiture.

data.title: XRP Price Action Tightens — Breakout Looms to The Upside
data.description:
XRP price started a fresh decline below the $2. 20 zone. The price is now consolidating losses and might recover if it clears the $2. 20 hurdle
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-price-action-tightens-2-20/

data.title: CZ: AI deep fakes have threatened the security of video verification
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CZ Yu X posted that artificial intelligence has been used for new deep fake hacker attacks, and even video call verification methods will soon become ineffective. 
CZ emphasized: "Don't install software from unofficial links, especially from 'friends', because their accounts are likely to have been hacked."

data.title: Deribit: Bitcoin options will have the largest quarterly delivery next Friday, with the biggest pain point at $100,000
data.description: Deribit data shows that next Friday will be the largest quarterly delivery for Bitcoin options, with a total notional value of $14 billion in options expiring, a put-call ratio of 0.7, and a maximum pain point of $100,000.

data.title: Mango Network opens airdrop query, accounting for 5% of the total airdrop
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Multi-VM full-chain infrastructure network Mango Network has opened an airdrop qualification query channel, accounting for 5% of the total airdrop, which will be released at one time. Official reminder: users can receive airdrops after TGE is launched on June 24, please pay attention to asset security.
Mango Network is a multi-virtual machine execution network using MoveVM, supporting MoveVM, EVM and SVM.

data.title: EU Seeks Information on Structural Changes Following xAI's Acquisition of Social Platform X
data.description: According to PANews, the European Union is requesting further details from the social platform X, formerly known as Twitter, regarding structural changes following its acquisition by Elon Musk's xAI for $33 billion. An EU Commission spokesperson stated that they are closely monitoring the company's structural changes. Previously, reports indicated that EU regulators are assessing whether X could face fines for violating the Digital Services Act (DSA), with potential penalties reaching up to 6% of global revenue. Neither X nor xAI has responded to these inquiries.

data.title: Gate BTC mining staked exceeds 1,000, ETH mining nearly 150,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The latest data from the Gate platform shows that the total staking volume of its BTC mining products has reached 1,016.99 BTC, with an annualized yield of 3.00%, and GT additional rewards are superimposed. Users can obtain an equal amount of GTBTC assets by staking BTC to achieve increased income.
The total staking volume of ETH mining products has reached 147,400 ETH, with a reference annualized yield of 3.10%. Users can obtain an equal amount of ETH2 assets by staking ETH to achieve increased income.
It is understood that the service allows users to retain the ownership of BTC/ETH assets, and both BTC and ETH mining support instant redemption, release liquidity and obtain stable income. In addition, the platform also provides multi-currency staking options. As of press time, the reference annualized yields of each currency are: USDC 4.34%, USDT 4.36%, SOL 14.95%, GT 7.09%.

data.title: Mining data highlights this week: Bitcoin's average weekly computing power fell by 6.68%; 70% of mining companies are still not registered with the Russian Federal Tax Service
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News, Week 25, 2025 (June 13-June 19):
1. According to cloverpool, the average computing power of the entire Bitcoin network is 865 EH/s, the highest is 949 EH/s, and the lowest is 742 EH/s, which is 6.68% lower than the average computing power last week (927 EH/s).
2. According to cloverpool, the block height 901,152 was produced at 09:46:44 on June 14, with an average block production time of 10 minutes and 25 seconds, and the mining difficulty is 126.41 T, which is 0.45% lower than the previous adjustment cycle.
3. According to blockchain.com, the average price of Bitcoin is US$105,603, the highest is US$108,952, and the lowest is US$102,664, which is 0.99% lower than the average price last week (US$106,660).
4. Mining news worth noting include:
(1) Ivan Chebeskov, an official of the Russian Ministry of Finance, revealed that although cryptocurrency mining regulations have been issued by the end of 2024, 70% of mining companies are still not registered with the Federal Tax Service.
(2) Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer announced that it will issue $300 million in principal convertible senior notes due in 2031 to qualified institutional buyers through a private placement. The company also plans to grant the initial purchasers of the notes an option to purchase an additional $45 million in principal within 13 days of the initial issuance of the notes.
Data partner: Cango Inc. (CANG), a Bitcoin mining company listed on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: North Korea targets crypto workers with new info-stealing malware
data.description:
North Korean threat actors have been deploying malware through fake crypto job sites, targeting blockchain professionals to steal wallet credentials, Cisco Talos says.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/north-korea-targets-crypto-job-seekers-to-plant-password-jacking-malware?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Major Crypto Exchanges to Accept BlackRock’s BUIDL Fund as Collateral
data.description:
Major crypto exchanges have started to accept BlackRock’s tokenized market fund for collateral.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/major-crypto-exchanges-to-accept-blackrocks-buidl-fund-as-collateral/

data.title: Meteora: New profit and loss tracker and DLMM fund pool tool to be launched
data.description: Solana ecosystem liquidity protocol Meteora released a summary of the community call meeting, including: 1. A new profit and loss tracker will be launched soon, which supports the display of USDC value, and the web version is under development; 2. A community tool for the DLMM funding pool will be developed to support tracking the decline in position liquidity and send notifications on Telegram; 3. A Dune dashboard will be created for DLMM and DBC.

data.title: Trader 0xb8b9's winning streak may be ended, and the current position loss exceeds 2 million US dollars
data.description: Lookonchain monitoring shows that the on-chain address 0xb8b9 has won 29 consecutive long transactions, with a cumulative profit of more than 2.3 million US dollars. It has recently bet on BTC, ETH, SOL and LINK, but the current floating loss of its holdings has exceeded 2 million US dollars.

data.title: JD.com Stock Declines Amid Stablecoin Licensing Ambitions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, JD.com's Hong Kong shares experienced a decline for the third consecutive day, with a current drop of 0.56%, bringing the stock price to 124 HKD.

Recently, JD Group's Chairman Liu Qiangdong expressed the company's intention to apply for stablecoin licenses in all major currency countries worldwide.

data.title: Bitcoin trades near $105K amid low volatility; analysts offer mixed outlooks
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) trades around $104. 5K, down 2% weekly, amid market uncertainty and Mideast tension fears. CryptoQuant warns BTC could revisit $92K or $81K if demand keeps falling. Glassnode sees “quiet” blockchain as network maturation, with institutions driving large-value transfers
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bitcoin-trades-near-105k-amid-low-volatility-analysts-offer-mixed-outlooks/
